handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260405 12:00:00 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU12345"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1001}
client req_historical_ticks {"req_id":"$req1","contract":{"symbol":"AAPL","sec_type":"STK","exchange":"SMART","currency":"USD"},"start_time":"20260405 08:00:00 America/New_York","end_time":"20260405 09:00:00 America/New_York","number_of_ticks":"25","what_to_show":"TRADES","use_rth":true,"ignore_size":false}
server historical_ticks_last {"req_id":"$req1","ticks":[{"time":"1712345678","tick_attrib":2,"price":"170.50","size":"100","exchange":"ARCA","special_conditions":""}],"done":true}
disconnect
